TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang q'yulang ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Kansai go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 53 buwan, 129 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 63 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 66 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 46%, saySiyat 2%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na q'yulang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na q'yulang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na q'yulang hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na q'yulang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na q'yulang hya' ga m'utu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qʔjulaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu kans~ɕai ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, ʦ~ʨou *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qʔjulaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qʔjulaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qʔjulaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na qʔjulaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qʔjulaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa mʔutu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang q'yulang ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Kansai go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 53 buwan, 129 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 49% kyan ku 63 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 51% kyan ku 66 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 46%, saySiyat 2%, Cou 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na q'yulang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na q'yulang hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na q'yulang hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na q'yulang hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na q'yulang hya' ga m'utu. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ qʔjulaŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu kans~ɕai ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, ʦ~ʨou *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na qʔjulaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na qʔjulaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na qʔjulaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na qʔjulaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na qʔjulaŋ ħjaʔ ɣa mʔutu. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
